    Index

    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    I

    ICompiledInstruction - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.compiling
    Represents a compiled instruction consisting of an opcode and fixed set of operands.
    ICompiledOperand - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.compiling
    Represents an operand used by compiled instruction.
    ICompiledProgram - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.compiling
    Represents a compiled program as an ordered sequence of compiled instructions.
    ICompiler - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation
    Defines the contract for a compiler that transforms a syntax tree into a ICompiledProgram.
    ICondition - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.conditions
    Represents a condition that can be evaluated against an IExecutionContext.
    IConfigEventListener - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.config
    Listener for receiving configuration parsing events.
    IConfigParser - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.config
    Defines the contract for a configuration parser.
    IExecutionContext - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime
    Represents the runtime state of a Registermaschine during program execution.
    IExecutionContextListener - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime
    Listener interface for observing changes in an IExecutionContext.
    IInstructionSet - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.instructions
    Defines a registry of available instructions.
    ILexer - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation
    Defines the contract for a lexical analyser (lexer) that transforms source text into a sequence of tokens.
    IMMEDIATE - Enum constant in enum class dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.compiling.OperandType
     
    incJumpCounter() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext
    Increments the internal jump counter.
    input() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext
    Retrieves an input value for an executing program.
    INSTRUCTION - Enum constant in enum class dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.lexing.TokenType
    Instruction mnemonic.
    IParser - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation
    Defines the contract for a parser that transforms a sequence of tokens into a ISyntaxTree.
    isHalted() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext
    Returns whether the machine has halted.
    isImplicit() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.api.config.ConfigOperand
    Returns whether this operand has an implicit value.
    ISyntaxTree - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.parsing
    Represents a syntax tree produced during the parsing phase.
    ISyntaxTreeNode - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.parsing
    Represents a node within a syntax tree.
    IToken - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.lexing
    Represents a lexical token produced during the lexing phase.
